steps.title: Set the equations equal at intersection
steps.content: At an intersection point, both expressions equal $y$. Set them equal: $$x^2 + 17x + 4 = x + 4$$

steps.title: Simplify and solve for x
steps.content: Subtract $x + 4$ from both sides: $$x^2 + 16x = 0$$ Factor out $x$: $$x(x + 16) = 0$$ This gives $x = 0$ or $x = -16$. The value $-16$ is choice A — A is correct.
